summary: A State of the Union excerpt in which Trump challenges members to stand and show support for protecting American citizens and tells those who stay seated they 'should be ashamed,' intercut with audience reaction shots (e.g., Sen. Mark Kelly), and ending on a single color-graded, oval-vignette beauty shot of an ICE/ERO officer with binoculars. The audio is the speech itself, not a song, and the piece is dominated by raw rostrum and reaction footage with only a brief stylized closing image. It is a lightly-produced speech clip rather than a music-driven cinematic montage, so it does not meet the produced youth-spectacle bar.
notable_text: ERO (officer vest); (spoken) "stand up and show your support"; "you should be ashamed of yourself"
